name: DrawingCreator
summary: The DrawingCreator class is for handling the creation of drawings using the built-in logic of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule, Identifier)
methods.summary: Creates drawings using the AutoDrawing tool of Tekla Structures.
